name: Turkey Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups No-Yolk Egg Noodle Substitue, cooked
2 cups Skim Milk, at room temperature
2 cups Turkey (light meat), skinless and cooked, cubed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
In a saucepan, melt margarine over medium-high heat. Add flour and cook, whisking quickly and constantly for 2 minutes.
Whisk in milk and Parmesan cheese. Cook, stirring constantly for another 2 minutes until thickened. Remove from heat.
Add noodles, turkey, onions, bell peppers, and mustard to the saucepan; toss to mix well.
Spoon the mixture into the prepared dish and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
Bake for 20 minutes or until browned and bubbly.
